title: +look -- room, player, thing, and exit formatting
description: Demonstrates the new pluggable default CONFORMAT room occupant and contents formatting (inspired by Rhost Vision style).

attributes.name: short-desc
attributes.value: A smart detective in a beige coat.

state.name: Iron Sword
state.description: A finely crafted blade of cold iron, perfectly balanced.

room.name: OOC Polis
room.desc: A quiet, dimly lit room in the city, smelling of paper and old books.

exits.name: North;n
exits.description: A dark pathway leading north towards the archives.

steps.note: Running 'look' with no arguments displays the room name, description, room occupants (sorted/padded using our custom pluggable default CONFORMAT handler), and exits.
Looking at another player displays their description and any carrying contents.
Looking at a thing/object displays its description.
Looking at an exit displays its alias and description.
